title: AI Minimalist Poster
description: Reduces a photo to an elegant minimalist poster composition.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an elegant contemporary minimalist poster. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, camera angle, framing, and the single most important contextual element. Simplify forms into clean silhouettes and a few confident flat shapes, use generous negative space, crisp edges, restrained visual hierarchy, and a harmonious palette of three to five colors derived from the source photo. Keep subtle facial cues where needed for recognition. Create a finished poster composition without any text or typography. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, typography, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, changed identity, distorted face, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, clutter, busy background, excessive detail, gradients, photorealism, glossy 3D render, heavy texture, muddy palette, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. cream, navy and coral palette, more negative space...
